events.title: Pokemon GO Fest 2026: Global
events.factualSummary: A free global weekend with rotating habitats, Mega Mewtwo raids, Special Research for Zeraora, and expanded daily event hours.
bonuses: Increased chance of encountering Shiny Pokemon
Nine free Raid Passes per day from Gym Photo Discs
Up to six Special Trades and half Stardust trade cost
One-hour Lure Modules and event Incense encounters
Mega Mewtwo X on Saturday and Mega Mewtwo Y on Sunday

events.title: Special Anniversary Pikachu Celebration
events.factualSummary: Three celebration windows feature costumed Pikachu in the wild, raids, and Field Research alongside event GO Pass milestones.
bonuses: Pikachu appears more frequently and is easier to catch
GO Pass milestones can unlock double transfer Candy
GO Pass milestones can unlock double catch Stardust
